macros.token:
**What is SameStr?**
`SameStr <https://github.com/danielpodlesny/samestr>`__ is a tool for identifying shared microbial strains across multiple metagenomic samples based on the similarity of SNV profiles.
**Workflow Overview**
A SameStr workflow consists of the following steps:
- **SameStr Convert**: Convert BAM files to variant profiles in NPZ format - **SameStr Extract**: Extract marker sequences from reference genomes - **SameStr Merge**: Combine multiple variant profiles from SameStr convert and/or extract into single files divided by clade - **SameStr Filter**: Apply quality filters to variant profiles from Samestr merge - **SameStr Stats**: Generate statistics on coverage and diversity from filtered variant profiles from SameStr filter - **SameStr Compare**: Calculate pairwise similarity between samples from SameStr filter - **SameStr Summarize**: Identify shared strains across files from Samestr compare based on defined criteria
---------

citations.citation: @software{samestr, title = {SameStr}, author = {Podlesny, Daniel and Fricke, W. Florian}, year = {2022}, url = {https://github.com/danielpodlesny/samestr}, license = {GNU Affero General Public License v3.0}, }
